proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map for napier-accommodation-arrears (S2)

### Status: No evidence provided

**Task:** T-04-002c-review-uploaded-sources — Review uploaded tenancy agreement and arrears correspondence

**Provided sources:** None
**Provided artifacts:** art-52854e615d7345c8a6fef1bf1f5afa78 (prior evidence map)

**Required documents (per task title):**
1. Tenancy agreement (or licence/occupancy agreement)
2. Arrears correspondence (e.g., demand letters, emails, notices)

**Next step:** Locate and upload the above documents to the matter record. Once uploaded, a follow-up task can review the terms, arrears amount, notice periods, and any applicable statutory exclusions (e.g., Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, schedule 1; Housing (Scotland) Act 1988, s.12 & schedule 4).
proposed_artifacts.title: Updated Evidence Map for napier-accommodation-arrears (S2)

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter record for the tenancy agreement (or licence/occupancy agreement) and any arrears correspondence (demand letters, emails, notices). Upload the found documents as source materials and trigger a follow-up evidence review task.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate and upload tenancy agreement and arrears correspondence

risk_flags.description: No tenancy agreement or arrears correspondence available for review; legal analysis cannot proceed.
Potential statutory exclusions (e.g., student accommodation under Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, schedule 1) cannot be evaluated.
Arrears amount, notice periods, and demand validity cannot be verified without the correspondence.

summary: No source materials, tenancy agreement, or arrears correspondence were provided in this work order. The prior evidence map (art-52854e615d7345c8a6fef1bf1f5afa78) also found no documents. The task cannot review uploaded sources because none exist. A follow-up task is proposed to locate and upload the required documents.
